description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a heavily rusted and weathered exterior, featuring pronounced horizontal ridges and pitting across its surface. The barrel is dark brown with patches of corrosion, giving it an aged, industrial appearance. A faded yellow label with partially legible black text is affixed to the side, suggesting it may have once contained chemicals or industrial materials. The top of the barrel is sealed with a matching metal lid, showing similar signs of rust and wear. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the structure appears robust and solid. The overall look suggests it has been exposed to the elements for an extended period, likely found in outdoor or industrial urban environments.
description: A large, rusted metal barrel with a sealed lid and a faded yellow label, showing heavy weathering and corrosion. Its industrial look and lack of handles suggest long-term outdoor or warehouse use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rusted cylindrical body with a prominent yellow label and heavy surface pitting.
description_view_1: This side reveals more corrosion and a partially torn yellow label, with deeper rust patches visible.
description_view_2: The label is visible but less prominent, and the surface texture appears consistently rough and corroded.
description_view_3: The label is mostly visible, and the rusted, pitted texture dominates the view, with no additional features.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faded yellow label with black text
